data.content: Implemented leaderboard qualification filtering in src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts so only agents with at least 10 completed attempts and success rate >25% are ranked. Mean, margin, and totalN now derive only from qualified rows, and steps with no qualified agents are omitted. Added regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts for mixed low-signal exclusion, <10 attempts, <=25% success rate, qualified tie-break ordering, and all-filtered omission. Validation in worktree /private/tmp/foolery-a71f: bun run vitest src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
